generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab
instance RealTimeDataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "real-time data visualization for operational monitoring"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "enhancing crane operations through optimal control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "alignment between physical and digital models for validation"
]

instance AirQualityRuntimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "runtime visualization for indoor air quality management"
]

instance AirQualitySimulation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "simulation capabilities for virus spread prevention"
]

instance AirQualityPrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "prediction capabilities for indoor air quality management"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "storing operational data in TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "trajectory computation for motion simulation"
]

instance DataTransmission : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "transmission of crane state data via MQTT",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "time-series database for storing operational data",
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplication
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based module for C4 Containers"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "containerization tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "interactive dashboard tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualization
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT communication broker",
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterface,
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplication
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling and kinematic simulations tool"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "system architecture modeling tool"
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "hardware control interfacing tool"
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "version control and code dissemination repository",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "geometric representation using CAD models",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "motion simulation model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "architecture visualization model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella, GantryLib
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "time-series data managed by TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "crane state data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "trajectory computation service",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryComputationInsight
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python application for collecting physical crane state data and transmitting via MQTT",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmission
]

instance OptimalControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "optimal control for enhancing crane operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "data visualization for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "continuous validation to ensure alignment between physical and digital models",
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "application that subscribes to MQTT topics and persists data to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingAction
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measures hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measures wind speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "motor for hoisting movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "electromagnet for container pickup at hoist end"
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "lab-scale gantry crane system operating in research and educational environment",
    base:contains CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends trajectory-based movement commands to the Physical Crane Interface for execution. Trajectories are generated by the Trajectory Generator Service using a kinematic model. The Continuous Validation Service monitors executed trajectories against simulations and notifies operators of discrepancies via the Dashboard. Command message formats, authentication, and execution confirmation details are not specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The lab scale gantry crane system employs containerization for deployment and adopts an ad-hoc architectural approach without a commercial digital twin framework, tailored for logistics and cyber-physical systems operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measurements of executed trajectories with simulations of those same trajectories to ensure model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT protocol in a publish-subscribe topology. The Physical Crane Interface connects to hardware controllers using unspecified industrial protocols. TimescaleDB serves as the data storage backend. Network bandwidth, latency requirements, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on-premise on a personal computer using Docker containerization, with Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services managed via a Docker Compose file. Computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and availability/reliability details beyond containerization are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standard utilized for digital twin modeling in Air Quality Management exemplar; C4 Model standard applied for architecture visualization in lab scale gantry crane system."
]
